base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_cursor_selection — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 legend of zelda. Pause-menu cursor — selects sub-weapon assigned to B button. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pause-menu cursor — selects sub-weapon assigned to B button
